title: Develop a grape production plan
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop a grape production plan demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Carry out preliminary planning activities

pcs.text: Identify and evaluate trends and issues affecting the Australian viticulture industry for their impact on planning decisions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and evaluate trends and issues affecting the Australian viticulture industry for their impact on planning decisions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and evaluate trends and issues affecting the Australian viticulture industry for their impact on planning decisions.

pcs.text: Determine client specifications for the production of grapes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine client specifications for the production of grapes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine client specifications for the production of grapes.

pcs.text: Assess the vineyard site for growing environment factors, resources, services and site modifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the vineyard site for growing environment factors, resources, services and site modifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the vineyard site for growing environment factors, resources, services and site modifications.

pcs.text: Conduct research into the characteristics and growing requirements of grape varieties and cultivars, legal attributes of the site, and local by-laws and restrictions that may affect the production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct research into the characteristics and growing requirements of grape varieties and cultivars, legal attributes of the site, and local by-laws and restrictions that may affect the production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct research into the characteristics and growing requirements of grape varieties and cultivars, legal attributes of the site, and local by-laws and restrictions that may affect the production plan.

pcs.text: Identify sustainable land use issues that may affect planned production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify sustainable land use issues that may affect planned production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify sustainable land use issues that may affect planned production.

pcs.text: Set production targets that are consistent with the marketing strategy and business plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set production targets that are consistent with the marketing strategy and business plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set production targets that are consistent with the marketing strategy and business plan.

pcs.text: Determine production requirements in terms of quantity and quality of grapes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine production requirements in terms of quantity and quality of grapes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine production requirements in terms of quantity and quality of grapes.

pcs.text: Develop a draft plan that reflects client preferences and requirements, and regulatory requirements and takes into account site factors and any identified sustainable land use requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a draft plan that reflects client preferences and requirements, and regulatory requirements and takes into account site factors and any identified sustainable land use requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a draft plan that reflects client preferences and requirements, and regulatory requirements and takes into account site factors and any identified sustainable land use requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Carry out preliminary planning activities

elements.title: Determine the production requirements for grapes

pcs.text: Identify grape varieties that are appropriate to the site and consistent with the plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify grape varieties that are appropriate to the site and consistent with the plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify grape varieties that are appropriate to the site and consistent with the plan.

pcs.text: Calculate, cost and confirm the quantity required with the supplier
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate, cost and confirm the quantity required with the supplier?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate, cost and confirm the quantity required with the supplier.

pcs.text: Select establishment procedures consistent with the agreed preliminary plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select establishment procedures consistent with the agreed preliminary plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select establishment procedures consistent with the agreed preliminary plan.

pcs.text: Document cultural management practices to achieve optimal growth
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document cultural management practices to achieve optimal growth?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document cultural management practices to achieve optimal growth.

pcs.text: Determine harvesting dates to meet market specifications and deadlines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine harvesting dates to meet market specifications and deadlines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine harvesting dates to meet market specifications and deadlines.

pcs.text: Determine production costs of growing grapes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine production costs of growing grapes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine production costs of growing grapes.

pcs.text: Identify hazards associated with production activities, assess risks and identify and document controls in the plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards associated with production activities, assess risks and identify and document controls in the plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards associated with production activities, assess risks and identify and document controls in the plan.

pcs.text: Identify policy concerning grapes not meeting specifications according to customer requirements, quality assurance policies and marketing strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify policy concerning grapes not meeting specifications according to customer requirements, quality assurance policies and marketing strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify policy concerning grapes not meeting specifications according to customer requirements, quality assurance policies and marketing strategy.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine the production requirements for grapes

elements.title: Schedule grape production activities

pcs.text: Outline staged implementation and development of the grape production activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Outline staged implementation and development of the grape production activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Outline staged implementation and development of the grape production activities.

pcs.text: Determine and document timelines for grape production activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and document timelines for grape production activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and document timelines for grape production activities.

pcs.text: Plan and schedule marketing according to the production schedule and marketing strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan and schedule marketing according to the production schedule and marketing strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan and schedule marketing according to the production schedule and marketing strategy.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Schedule grape production activities

elements.title: Plan monitoring of the grape production plan

pcs.text: Determine production activities to be monitored, the format for recording factors, frequency of monitoring and the thresholds for remedial action
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine production activities to be monitored, the format for recording factors, frequency of monitoring and the thresholds for remedial action?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine production activities to be monitored, the format for recording factors, frequency of monitoring and the thresholds for remedial action.

pcs.text: Document required remedial action or contingency plan for implementation by staff
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document required remedial action or contingency plan for implementation by staff?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document required remedial action or contingency plan for implementation by staff.

pcs.text: Review the effectiveness of the monitoring system on a regular basis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review the effectiveness of the monitoring system on a regular basis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review the effectiveness of the monitoring system on a regular basis.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Plan monitoring of the grape production plan

elements.title: Match grape production to required output

pcs.text: Determine grape yields required to meet client projections
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine grape yields required to meet client projections?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine grape yields required to meet client projections.

pcs.text: Determine grape variety required to meet output
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine grape variety required to meet output?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine grape variety required to meet output.

pcs.text: Compare production program to client projections
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare production program to client projections?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare production program to client projections.

pcs.text: Implement remedial action or contingency plan where grape production falls outside client projections
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement remedial action or contingency plan where grape production falls outside client projections?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement remedial action or contingency plan where grape production falls outside client projections.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Match grape production to required output

elements.title: Prepare and document the grape production plan and specifications

pcs.text: Prepare detailed plans and specifications based on industry conventions and the requirements of production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare detailed plans and specifications based on industry conventions and the requirements of production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare detailed plans and specifications based on industry conventions and the requirements of production.

pcs.text: Produce a scaled vineyard site plan which can be readily interpreted and understood by on-site personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Produce a scaled vineyard site plan which can be readily interpreted and understood by on-site personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Produce a scaled vineyard site plan which can be readily interpreted and understood by on-site personnel.

pcs.text: Develop and document detailed on-site procedures and schedules required for grape production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and document detailed on-site procedures and schedules required for grape production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and document detailed on-site procedures and schedules required for grape production.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Prepare and document the grape production plan and specifications

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
